Diverse Ecosystem of Athene Network
Athene Group pledge to use 70% of post-tax profits from all Athene ecosystem products to repurchase and burn ATH, with the remainder shared among ATH holders.
Athene Foundation

We're committed to investing in promising projects, guiding them toward blockchain integration to operate on the Athene.Network mainnet.
Athene Gaming

Featuring more than 5000 slot games and 1000 live table games, the community can experience gaming using the ATH coin.
Athene LaunchPad

Support and develop new crypto startup projects, enabling them to access capital and the investment community.
Athene DEX

DEX Trading Platform: Secure, transparent trading platform.
Athene Bridge

Facilitating asset connections between blockchains, enhancing liquidity, and connections for coins running on the ATH mainnet.
Athene App

A decentralized data collection and aggregation platform: utilizing blockchain technology and AI, enabling machine learning, market research, and trend analysis.
Athene P2P Trading Exchange

Safe - Fast - Diverse

Buy/Sell at the best price, diverse with many payment and transaction methods wherever you are in the world.
Athene E-commerce Platform

Global E-commerce platform, allowing payment with ATH.
Athene Wallet

Easy management of digital assets.
LION COIN - KING OF MEME
$LION is the Alpha Predator meme coin, the King of all Meme Coins. Liquidity Pool tokens are burnt, and contract ownership is renounced.
🌟 Total Supply:
820,680,000,000,000
109,100,000,000,000
🚀 Ticker: $LION
🚫 No Tax, No Owner Burn LP.
Just LION

Let's step in with LION Adventure to the Moon!

Coinbase app

Connect with your Coinbase account

  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
